restaurant.name: Donna – Pizzeria Ristorante
restaurant.system_prompt: You are the virtual assistant for Donna, an authentic Italian pizzeria and restaurant in Leipzig. Be warm and welcoming, like a friendly Italian host. Use casual but professional tone. If someone greets in Italian, respond in Italian. Recommend our wood-fired pizzas as our specialty. Mention that we use imported Italian ingredients.

menu.name: Bruschetta Classica
menu.description: Toasted bread with fresh tomatoes, garlic, basil, and extra virgin olive oil

menu.name: Burrata con Pomodorini
menu.description: Creamy burrata with cherry tomatoes, basil, and aged balsamic

menu.name: Antipasto Misto
menu.description: Selection of Italian cured meats, cheeses, olives, and grilled vegetables

menu.name: Margherita
menu.description: San Marzano tomato, fior di latte mozzarella, fresh basil

menu.name: Diavola
menu.description: Tomato, mozzarella, spicy salami, chili flakes

menu.name: Quattro Formaggi
menu.description: Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmigiano, fontina

menu.name: Prosciutto e Rucola
menu.description: Tomato, mozzarella, prosciutto crudo, rocket, parmesan shavings

menu.name: Marinara
menu.description: San Marzano tomato, garlic, oregano, extra virgin olive oil — no cheese

menu.name: Bufala e Pomodorini
menu.description: Buffalo mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, basil, olive oil

menu.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
menu.description: Guanciale, egg yolk, pecorino romano, black pepper — the Roman way

menu.name: Risotto ai Funghi Porcini
menu.description: Carnaroli rice, porcini mushrooms, parmigiano, truffle oil

menu.name: Lasagna della Nonna
menu.description: Homemade layers with ragù, béchamel, mozzarella, parmigiano

menu.name: Saltimbocca alla Romana
menu.description: Veal escalopes with prosciutto, sage, white wine sauce

menu.name: Branzino al Forno
menu.description: Oven-baked sea bass with lemon, capers, cherry tomatoes

menu.name: Tiramisù
menu.description: Classic tiramisu with mascarpone, espresso, cocoa

menu.name: Panna Cotta
menu.description: Vanilla panna cotta with mixed berry coulis

menu.name: Sorbetto al Limone
menu.description: Homemade lemon sorbet

menu.name: Acqua Minerale
menu.description: Still or sparkling, 0.75L

menu.name: Chianti Classico (Bicchiere)
menu.description: Glass of Chianti Classico DOCG

menu.name: Aperol Spritz
menu.description: Aperol, Prosecco, soda, orange slice

faqs.question: Wo kann ich parken?
faqs.answer: Es gibt Straßenparkplätze in der Nähe und ein Parkhaus 5 Minuten zu Fuß entfernt.

faqs.question: Habt ihr vegane Optionen?
faqs.answer: Ja! Wir haben vegane Pizzen (Marinara), Bruschetta, Penne all'Arrabbiata und Sorbetto al Limone.

faqs.question: Kann man bei euch auch draußen sitzen?
faqs.answer: Ja, wir haben eine Terrasse mit Platz für ca. 14 Gäste, wetterabhängig.

faqs.question: Gibt es glutenfreie Pizza?
faqs.answer: Aktuell bieten wir keinen glutenfreien Teig an, aber viele unserer Antipasti, Primi (Risotto) und Secondi sind glutenfrei.

faqs.question: Do you take reservations?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can book directly through this chat. Just tell me the date, time, and how many guests.

faqs.question: Accettate prenotazioni per gruppi?
faqs.answer: Sì, accettiamo prenotazioni fino a 12 persone. Per gruppi più grandi, contattateci direttamente.

reviews.text: Best pizza in Leipzig! The Margherita is absolutely perfect.
Die Carbonara schmeckt wie in Rom. Burrata als Vorspeise ist ein Muss!
Lovely atmosphere, the Diavola pizza was spicy and delicious. Tiramisu was heavenly.
Prosciutto e Rucola pizza — best I've had outside Italy. Risotto was also excellent.
Great Aperol Spritz and the lasagna was like nonna makes it.
Food was good but had to wait 40 minutes for our pizza on a Saturday night.
